headline: Stop the stall: move hard, eat tight, today counts double.
summary: You lost zero kilos last week; TODAY you execute: strict Huel portions, one rowing session, zero snacking—rebuilding toward -0.61 kg/week.
details: Eat: Use three Huel meals today as your foundation; no additional snacking or margin for error. Move: 30–45 minutes on the rowing machine at steady effort—your sedentary work means intentional cardio is non-negotiable. Why: Tuesday is your reset window before weekend pressure hits; every kg this week closes your 529-day deficit, and zero-progress weeks are killing your 2027 goal. You have the tools; today is about using them.
